blocks.body: Key Rule: Subtracting an integer is the same as adding its opposite. a - b = a + (-b). Always convert subtraction to addition of the opposite, then use the addition rules.

blocks.label: Example 2
blocks.body: 7 - (-3) = 7 + 3 = 10. Subtracting a negative is the same as adding a positive.

blocks.label: Example 3
blocks.body: -5 - 4 = -5 + (-4) = -9. Both negative, same sign -> add absolute values, keep negative.
The phrase "keep, change, change" helps: KEEP the first number, CHANGE subtraction to addition, CHANGE the sign of the second number. Then use the addition rules.
